toolPurpose: Search for contacts/users in Intercom by email, name, or custom attributes using advanced query syntax.

email.description: Search for contact by exact email address

name.description: Search for contact by name (partial match supported)

phone.description: Search for contact by phone number

external_id.description: Search for contact by external ID from your system

custom_attributes.description: Search using custom attribute key-value pairs (e.g., {"company": "Acme", "plan": "premium"})

query.description: Advanced Intercom query syntax for complex searches

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20, max: 150)

toolPurpose: Retrieve full details of a specific contact by ID, including profile information, custom attributes, and interaction history.

contact_id.description: Intercom contact ID (required if email not provided)

email.description: Contact email address (required if contact_id not provided)

toolPurpose: List conversations with optional filters by status, assignee, contact, or date range.

status.description: Filter conversations by status (open, closed, snoozed, all)

assignee_id.description: Filter conversations assigned to a specific team member ID

contact_id.description: Filter conversations for a specific contact ID

limit.description: Maximum number of conversations to return (default: 20, max: 100)

toolPurpose: Retrieve a specific conversation with all messages, participant information, and metadata.
Send a reply message to a conversation from the Intercom operator/admin account. Requires Steward confirmation.

conversation_id.description: Intercom conversation ID to reply to

message_body.description: The reply message content (supports basic HTML formatting)

message_type.description: Type of message (comment for internal note, or default for customer-facing reply)

attachments.description: Array of attachment URLs to include with the message

toolPurpose: Search the Intercom help center for articles matching a query string.

language.description: Language code for the search results (default: en, e.g., 'es', 'fr', 'de')

limit.description: Maximum number of articles to return (default: 10, max: 50)
